subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, sent down in truth from the heaven of exalted glory. Blessed is he who hath purified his ears to hearken unto His Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله قد نزلت بالحق من سماء عز رفیعا طوبی لمن طهر اذنیه لاصغاء کلمه
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @idolatry
